title: Hige-san and Marshmallow
overview: Meet Hige, a middle-aged office worker, and his subordinate Wakabayashi, an office lady who has a thing for him... even though he only has eyes for marshmallows.

title: Rain and Marshmallow
overview: Hige gets caught in the rain on his way to work, so he takes cover under an awning... where he's soon joined by a rain-drenched Wakabayashi.

title: Train and Marshmallow
overview: Hige and Wakabayashi find themselves on the same train together. Realizing that everyone is staring at them, Hige starts to move to another car... only to land in an even more precarious predicament.

title: Fairy and Marshmallow
overview: A school class takes a field trip to the Tabekko Marshmallow factory... and for some reason, Hige is there as well.

title: Drinking and Marshmallow
overview: Wakabayashi goes out for drinks with her female coworkers, but all she can seem to talk about is Hige.

title: Brother and Marshmallow
overview: Worried by his sister's obsession with Hige, Wakabayashi's younger brother sets out to show his sister what pigs men can be. A company barbecue seems like a perfect opportunity.

title: Mioko and Marshmallow
overview: Mioko is saved from a groper on the train, and recognizes her savior as her coworker Hige.

title: Surprise and Marshmallow
overview: Hige is depressed when he finds out that Tabekko Marshmallows will no longer be produced. Wakabayashi tells him that she still has some bags that she bought and saved, and invites him over to pick them up.

title: Normal and Marshmallow
overview: Wakabayashi's younger brother encounters Hige and Mioko out together, and teaches Mioko something that should help her get between his sister and Hige.

title: Amusement Park and Marshmallow
overview: Hige and Wakabayashi accompany Mioko to the amusement park. As usual, Mioko tries to get Hige away from Wakabayashi, but Hige's unexpected reaction changes all her plans.

title: Hot Springs Trip and Marshmallow
overview: When Mioko and Hige disappear together during a company hot springs trip, Wakabayashi is determined to find them before anything happens.

title: Wakabayashi and Marshmallow
overview: Wakabayashi is still searching for Hige, when he comes running down the hall and crashes right into her. The two sit down to take a breather and Wakabayashi wonders if it's finally time to tell him how she really feels.
